sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45039" key="eu)rusmatw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐρυσμᾰτώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n45039.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like a dilatation</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βρογχοκήλη</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:38" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.38</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
